title: conyza collina
intro: Conyza collina, also known as horse mint or fleabane, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which help to soothe digestive issues and relieve respiratory problems. The health benefits of Conyza collina include reducing inflammation, calming the digestive system, and alleviating symptoms of colds and flu. Conyza collina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and enjoy its various health benefits.
